data.title: IMF Chief Highlights Rapid Digitalization of Fiat Currencies
data.description: According to Foresight News, Kristalina Georgieva, the Managing Director of the International Monetary Fund (IMF), recently emphasized the need for countries to acknowledge the accelerating digitalization of fiat currencies. She noted that the adoption of cryptocurrencies is advancing at an exponential rate, urging nations to understand and decide how to integrate these digital assets into their financial systems.

data.title: Binance Alpha will list ANOME with a minimum score of 220 points
data.description: Binance Wallet announced that ANOME trading will be available on the Binance Alpha platform at 08:00 (UTC) on October 17, 2025. Upon launch, users holding at least 220 Alpha Points will be eligible to claim a first-come, first-served airdrop of 320 ANOME tokens. The point threshold will automatically decrease by 15 points every hour until the reward pool is fully distributed. Claiming the airdrop will cost 15 Alpha Points, and users must confirm their claim within 24 hours on the Alpha event page; otherwise, their share will be forfeited.

data.title: BTC fell below 108,000 USDT, down 2.74% in 24 hours
data.description: OKX market data shows that BTC has fallen below 108,000 USDT, currently trading at 107,991.1 USDT, a 24-hour drop of 2.74%. (This newsletter was generated with AI assistance)

data.title: Caixin reports that QMMM's major shareholder is Gui Bin, grandson of Cantonese opera master Gui Mingyang, with a stake valued at US$985 million.
data.description: According to Caixin, Kwai Bun, the 47-year-old founder, major shareholder, and CEO of QMMM, a Hong Kong-based cryptocurrency treasury company that was ordered to suspend trading by the US SEC, is from an artistic family. His grandfather was Gui Mingyang, a master of one of the five major schools of Cantonese opera. As QMMM's largest shareholder, his latest annual report shows that Kwai Bun holds 8.25 million shares. Based on the pre-suspension price of $119.4 per share, his holdings are worth $985 million. Hong Kong media outlets contacted Kwai Bun after QMMM's suspension, but he immediately hung up after realizing the call was from a reporter. QMMM had previously reported plans to establish a diversified cryptocurrency treasury with an initial size of $100 million. However, its Hong Kong headquarters was recently found to be deserted. Upon contacting staff at another nearby company, they claimed the company had relocated in September and were unaware of the relocation.

data.title: Andrew Kang's associated address shorted 22,271 ETH with 25x leverage, equivalent to approximately $86.74 million.
data.description: According to MLM monitoring, an address associated with Mechanism Capital partner Andrew Kang is currently shorting 22,271 ETH with 25x leverage, equivalent to approximately $86.74 million, at an average price of $3,926.95, with a current unrealized profit of $760,000. Additionally, the address holds a $5.71 million short position in SOL and a $590,000 long position in ENA.

data.title: Pudgy Penguins forms strategic partnership with bipartisan public affairs firm Invariant
data.description: Igloo Inc. announced a partnership with Invariant, a bipartisan public affairs firm, to introduce Pudgy Penguins and the PENGU project to U.S. policymakers. The renowned NFT project, Pudgy Penguins, plans to leverage its professional government relations services to build a bridge of communication in Washington, D.C., and contribute to improving the regulatory environment for the cryptocurrency industry.

data.title: A whale lowered its ETH limit buy order to $3660-3710, a $100 decrease from the original order price.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi's monitoring, the whale who had previously placed a limit buy order readjusted the price range when the price fell early this morning. The latest ETH bottom-fishing expectation is "US$3660-3710". At this point, he plans to buy US$11 million, which is US$100 lower than the original order price.

data.title: Codex and PDAX Form Strategic Partnership to Enhance Remittance Services
data.description: According to Foresight News, the stablecoin blockchain network Codex has entered into a strategic partnership with the Philippine cryptocurrency exchange PDAX. This collaboration aims to leverage Codex Avenue to offer stablecoin exchange services and utilize Codex Chain for settlement processes. The partnership is designed to optimize remittance procedures in the Philippines, enhancing efficiency and reliability for users.

data.title: TeraWulf Inc. Announces $3.2 Billion Note Offering for Data Center Expansion
data.description: According to PANews, Bitcoin mining company TeraWulf Inc. (NASDAQ: WULF) has announced the pricing of its $3.2 billion 7.750% senior secured notes due in 2030 through its wholly-owned subsidiary, WULF Compute LLC. The notes will be offered privately to qualified institutional investors, with the transaction expected to close on October 23, 2025, subject to market and other conditions. The notes will be fully and unconditionally guaranteed by WULF Compute's subsidiaries, La Lupa Data LLC, Akela Data Holdings LLC, and Akela Data LLC. WULF Compute plans to use the net proceeds from this offering to fund the expansion of its data center facilities at the Lake Mariner campus in Barker, New York.

data.title: Sun Wukong's trading volume exceeded 2 billion USDT in the first week after its launch, with its depth increasing threefold.
data.description: Just seven days after its launch, the Chinese decentralized contract trading platform "Sun Wukong" has surpassed 2 billion USDT in cumulative trading volume. On October 16th, trading volume reached 85 million USDT, a 17% month-over-month increase. The platform's total assets reached 63 million USDT, a 16% increase. Regarding liquidity, the depth of K2 pairs has significantly increased. BTC's depths at 1100, 1500, and 1110 increased by 330%, 288%, and 156% respectively compared to the previous day; ETH's depths at 1100, 1500, and 1110 increased by 264%, 210%, and 150% respectively, demonstrating a continuous improvement in the user trading experience. Furthermore, the Sun Wukong platform has launched a deposit-earning program: users depositing USDT can enjoy a 12% annualized return, with no lock-up, freeze, or limit, helping users flexibly grow their assets.

data.title: Igloo Partners with Invariant to Advocate for Pudgy Penguins in U.S. Policy
data.description: According to Foresight News, Igloo, the parent company of the NFT series Pudgy Penguins, has formed a partnership with Invariant, a bipartisan public affairs, lobbying, and government relations firm. This collaboration aims to communicate the story of Pudgy Penguins to U.S. policymakers, establishing a continuous engagement channel between Pengu and decision-makers focused on optimizing the crypto ecosystem. The official statement highlights that over the past year, Igloo has engaged in private events, Capitol Hill visits, and policy seminars to facilitate in-depth discussions with members of Congress and senior staff.

data.title: CryptoQuant analyst: Bitcoin's main support level is between $106,000 and $107,000. If it fails, it will test $100,000
data.description: CryptoQuant analyst Axel posted on social media that Bitcoin's current primary support zone is concentrated in the $106,000–107,000 range (STH 1- to 3-month realized price - 200-day simple moving average). A break below this range could lead BTC to test support at $100,000, where the annual moving average (365-day simple moving average) lies. As long as this base holds, the market structure remains bullish.

data.title: Japan's Central Bank Signals Potential Interest Rate Hike
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Japan's Deputy Governor of the Central Bank, Shinichi Uchida, has indicated that interest rates may continue to rise if economic and price trends align with their forecasts. This statement reflects the bank's ongoing assessment of the country's economic conditions and its commitment to adjusting monetary policy accordingly.

data.title: CZ: All DAT companies should use third-party custody and be subject to investor audits
data.description: Binance founder CZ stated in a post on the X platform that all DAT companies should use third-party crypto asset custody services and have their account settings audited by investors. He emphasized that this is a prerequisite for Yzi Labs to invest in any BNB DAT project, aiming to ensure asset security and investment transparency.

data.title: ‘Ethereum could flip Bitcoin’ like Wall Street flipped gold: Tom Lee
data.description:
BitMine’s Tom Lee says that Ethereum will eventually flip Bitcoin’s market cap, which is almost five times smaller currently.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/ethereum-bitcoin-wall-street-gold-bitmine-tom-lee?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss%3Fcachebust%3Dtrue%26noCache%3Dtrue%26_q%3D1760681561028%26nc%3D1760681561028&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound
